title: Triple blend 001199 001198 001196
summary: Blend two CatBoost-corrected variants with the four-seed RealMLP variant.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Produce pred_001199, pred_001198, and pred_001196. Set final predictions to 0.60 * pred_001199 + 0.25 * pred_001198 + 0.15 * pred_001196. Keep validation leak-free.
expected_effect: Use four-seed neural stability as a small correction to the strongest CatBoost-corrected family.
risk: The four-seed signal may be redundant with the parent and cost more runtime.
